titleStmt.title: SII 7.429: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 429. (A.R. No. 216 of 1901). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . svasti samastajagadādhāra somakulatilaka madhurāpurimādhava keraḷavamśanirmūlana laṅkādvipaluṇṭanadvitiyarāma coḷakulaśailakuliśa karṇṇāṭarājavidrāvaṇa kāṭhakakarikūṭapākala vividharipudurggamarddana viragaṇḍagopālavipinadāvadahana kāñcīpuravarādhīśvara gaṇapati hariṇa
śārdūla nelūrapuraviracitavirābhiṣeka praṇatarājapratiṣṭhāpaka ma hārājādhirāja parameśvara tribhuvanacakravatti kaḷThe two letters kaḷ have been entered after śrī in smaller characters. śrīsundarapāṇḍyade varThe letter ṇḍya is corrected from ṇḍi.Uttara- meruccaturvveti maṅkalattup paṟṟāṉa vaṅkārattu Ūrārkku Eyilkoṭṭattu tirumākaṟal tiruvakattiśva ramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku namperāl kaṭṭiṉa cuntara
pāṇṭiyaṉ tirunāḷukkum pūjai kkum Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavuk kuṭalākat taṅkaḷuril nālpāṟkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey Eppeyaṟpaṭṭaṉavukkum tāṅkaḷ Iṟukkum kaṭamai poṉvari viṉiyokam Āyavaṟkam Upātikaḷ Uṭpaṭa sarvvamā�ya ṅkaḷum Eḻāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟuttoṇṇūṟṟunālu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟai
iliyākak kuṭuttu variyilum kaḻippatākac coṉṉom Ivai Innāḷmutal Ikkoyil tāṉattārvacame kuṭuttuppotavum Ippaṭi ka nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlasthāpa ṉamum paṇṇik kallilum cempilum veṭṭavumThe word ve[ṭṭa]vum is written below the line.pārkka Ivai pāṇṭimaṇṭalattu muttūṟṟukūṟṟunāṭṭu Antaṇūrcciṟukampūr vaṇṭu
varāpati viṟṟiruntāṉāṉa paḻantiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ikkal veṭṭiṉa vaṅkāramāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyanallūril Uṭaiyār tiruvira kum vināyakappiḷḷaiyārkkum tevatāṉam kuḻi Iraṇṭāyirattu muṉṉūṟṟunālum Aḻicavūr Uṭaiyār Aruḷāḷiśvara muṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉam kuḻi toḷāyirattu Aympatu
m maṭappuṟam kuḻi Irunūṟum varatarājaviṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kuḻi nāṉūṟum piṭārippaṭṭi kuḻi nūṟṟunāṟpattuāṟum Āka kuḻi 4 1000 Ikkuḻi nālāyiramum Ittevarkaḷukku candrāditta varai cellakkaṭavatu .
Digital edition of SII 7.429 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
